metaDescription: Muse Spark (Meta), released 2026-04-08 — part of the Muse Spark line. First model in the Muse family from Meta Superintelligence Labs: natively multimodal reas…
overview: Muse Spark is a large language model from Meta, part of the Muse Spark line. Released 2026-04-08. Meta Superintelligence Labs' first proprietary, closed-weight frontier reasoning model, built on a new stack and served on Meta AI.

What's notable in this version: First model in the Muse family from Meta Superintelligence Labs: natively multimodal reasoning, tool use, visual chain-of-thought and multi-agent orchestration, with a gradually rolling-out parallel-agent 'Contemplating' mode. Proprietary/closed-weight, free on meta.ai and the Meta AI app; marks Meta's pivot from open Llama toward closed frontier models.
